document.title: FMCSA Dataset Description and Data Definitions - Select Datasets
document.source: U.S. Department of Transportation, Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration
document.update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time

daily_difference.description: Includes records updated or added since the previous run. May include all other records for the entity in addition to the updated/added record. May also include records where an update occurred to related data for completeness.

all_with_history.description: Full/Baseline dataset; includes all records (including historical values where appropriate) as of the latest dataset update.

carrier.description: Records for all carriers/brokers/freight forwarders with active, inactive, or pending authorities (common or contract). Includes DOT number, docket number, entity census, authority, and insurance data.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: MX Type
fields.definition: FMCSA character distinguishing Mexican carriers

fields.name: RFC Number
fields.definition: Mexican Government registration code for Mexican carriers

fields.name: Common Authority
fields.definition: Common authority status

fields.name: Contract Authority
fields.definition: Contract authority status

fields.name: Broker Authority
fields.definition: Broker authority status

fields.name: BIPD Required
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance required (in thousands)

fields.name: BIPD on File
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance on file (in thousands)

fields.name: DBA Name
fields.definition: Doing Business As name

fields.name: Legal Name
fields.definition: Company Legal Name

fields.name: Business Telephone Number
fields.definition: If on file

fields.name: Business Fax Number
fields.definition: If on file

fields.name: Mailing Telephone Number
fields.definition: If on file

fields.name: Mailing Fax Number
fields.definition: If on file

insur.description: Records for carrier/broker/freight forwarder active or pending individual insurance policies. Linked by docket number. Entities can hold multiple policies so there may be multiple records per entity.
insur.notes: The daily difference dataset provides insurance policy removals as blank records (all empty or 00000 values except docket number).

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: Insurance Type
fields.definition: Type of insurance
fields.note: For type 1, amounts are in fields 4 and 5. For types 2, 3, 4, amounts in fields 4 and 5 will be 0.

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Dollar Limit
fields.definition: Amount in thousands; company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of this

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Dollar Limit
fields.definition: Amount in thousands

fields.name: Policy Number
fields.definition: Insurance policy specific identifier

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Effective date of the policy

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (policy may be administered by a company branch with a different name)

act_pend_insur.description: Information on the implementation dates of an active or pending insurance policy (posted date, effective date, cancel effective date). Also contains insurance company name, BI&PD limits, and the DOT/docket number of the holder.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Form Code
fields.note: For form codes 91, 91X, and 82, amounts are in fields 8 and 9. For 34, 83, 84, 85, amounts will be 0.

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Description of insurance form/class

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (may be administered by a branch with a different name)

fields.name: Policy Number
fields.definition: Insurance policy specific identifier

fields.name: Posted Date
fields.definition: Date FMCSA received the policy

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Limit
fields.definition: Amount in thousands

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Limit
fields.definition: Amount in thousands; company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of this

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Effective date of the policy

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

auth_hist.description: Records showing the history of each authority granted to a carrier/broker/freight forwarder, with dates of original and final authority actions. Multiple authorities per entity means multiple records.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Sub Number
fields.definition: Action sequence number; not commonly used

fields.name: Operating Authority Type
fields.definition: Operating Authority Type

fields.name: Original Authority Action Description
fields.definition: Starting authority action

fields.name: Original Authority Action Served Date
fields.definition: Date starting authority action executed

fields.name: Final Authority Action Description
fields.definition: Final authority action

fields.name: Final Authority Decision Date
fields.definition: Date final authority action determined

fields.name: Final Authority Served Date
fields.definition: Date final authority action became effective

boc3.description: Records for each BOC3 agent hired by a carrier/broker/freight forwarder. Each entity must hire a BOC3 agent for legal representation to obtain operating authority. Some entities may act as their own BOC3 agent.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Company Name
fields.definition: Process agent company name

fields.name: Attention to or Title
fields.definition: Process agent company contact

fields.name: Street or PO Box
fields.definition: Process agent company address street

fields.name: City
fields.definition: Process agent company address city

fields.name: State
fields.definition: Process agent company address state

fields.name: Country
fields.definition: Process agent company address country

fields.name: Zip Code
fields.definition: Process agent company address zip code

boc3.note: Field #3 is skipped in the source document numbering.

ins_hist.description: Information on a carrier's/broker's/freight forwarder's previous insurance policies. Contains cancellation method, policy type, policy number, and effective/cancellation dates. All info relates to the policy being cancelled/replaced/name-changed — NOT the subsequent policy.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Cancellation Method
fields.definition: Can be: cancelled, replaced, name change, or transferred

fields.name: Cancel/Replace/Name Change/Transfer Form
fields.definition: The form that executed the action

values.36: BMC Surety Bond Cancellation Form (for cancelled)
values.85C: BMC Cancellation for Trust Funds (for cancelled)

values.*: Not BIPD (Cargo, Surety, or Trust Fund)

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Description of insurance form/class

fields.name: Policy Number
fields.definition: Insurance policy specific identifier

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity, in thousands

fields.name: Insurance Class Code
fields.definition: For BI&PD form codes; P = primary, E = excess

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Effective date of the insurance policy

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Limit Amount
fields.definition: Amount in thousands. When class code is E, this is the value of the primary insurance.
fields.note: Only populated for form codes 91, 91X, 82. For 34, 83, 84, 85 this will be 0.

fields.name: BI&PD Max Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the insurance policy, in thousands

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

fields.name: Specific Cancellation Method
fields.definition: TERM/CANCL = cancellation executed by FMCSA; Term/REPL = replacement by new policy submission

fields.name: Insurance Company Branch
fields.definition: Insurance company branch number

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name

ins_hist.note: Field #16 is skipped in the source document numbering.

rejected.description: Information on insurance forms rejected by FMCSA. Contains policy info, rejection date, and rejection reason.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Insurance type associated with the rejected form

fields.name: Policy Number
fields.definition: Insurance policy specific identifier

fields.name: Received Date
fields.definition: Date FMCSA received the form

fields.name: Insurance Class Code
fields.definition: P = primary, E = excess (when available)

fields.name: Underlying Limit Amount
fields.definition: Amount in thousands

fields.name: Maximum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the insurance policy, in thousands

fields.name: Rejected Date
fields.definition: Date the submitted form was rejected

fields.name: Insurance Branch
fields.definition: Insurance company branch number

fields.name: Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name

fields.name: Rejected Reason
fields.definition: The reason the form was rejected

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity, in thousands

rejected.note: Field #12 is skipped in the source document numbering.

revocation.description: Information on carrier/broker/freight forwarder authorities revoked by FMCSA. Includes DOT number, docket number, authority type revoked, and reason.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Operating Authority Registration Type
fields.definition: Operating authority can be either common, contract, or broker

fields.name: Serve Date
fields.definition: Date the first revocation letter was sent to the entity

fields.name: Revocation Type
fields.definition: The type of revocation action

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the revocation is effective
